text.title: Ad Account Hygiene Checklist Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Ad Account Hygiene Checklist. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Checklist marked '14/14 complete' weekly for 6 months; account audit shows 4 items never actually run.
antipattern.fix: Require timestamp + observation per item; spot-check at random quarterly.

antipattern.symptom: Single 30-item list; reviewer overwhelmed; only first 8 done.
antipattern.fix: Split into weekly + monthly; cap weekly at 14, monthly at 8.

antipattern.symptom: Same item skipped 8 weeks in a row; root cause (broken UI) never surfaced.
antipattern.fix: Require reason on every skip; quarterly audit surfaces repeated reasons for fix.
